title: Read a Bus Route Map
summary: Read a bus route map to find stops, routes, and transfer points.
learnerPromise: You will be able to read a bus route map and find your stop, route number, direction, and transfer points.
whyItMatters: Bus maps help you get around without guessing. Knowing how to read one makes public transit less confusing and helps you feel more confident traveling on your own.
realLifeUses: Finding the right bus stop near your home or school
Figuring out which route takes you to a shopping area or appointment
Locating where to switch buses to reach a farther destination
Checking if a bus route runs near a friend's neighborhood
materialsNeeded: A printed or digital bus route map (from a transit website or app)
result: You can point out your start and end stops and name the route you would take.
youWillLearn: How to locate bus stops on a map
How to follow a route line from start to finish
How to identify route numbers and names
How to spot transfer points where routes meet
miniChallenge: Use a bus route map for your area to trace a route from one familiar location to another. Name the route number and find one transfer point along the way.
steps: Open or unfold the bus route map for your area.
Find the stop closest to where you would start your trip.
Trace the route line to see which direction it goes and where it ends.
Look for any transfer points where your route crosses or meets another route.
Name the route number and the final stop or transfer point you would use.
completionCriteria: You identified the correct route number for your trip
You traced the full path from start to destination
You named at least one transfer point if one exists
commonProblems: Route lines overlap on busy maps and are hard to follow
Some maps use small print that is difficult to read
It is not always clear which direction the bus travels on the route
tips: Use your finger to trace the route line so you do not lose track
Look for a route legend or key that explains colors and symbols
Digital maps often let you zoom in and tap a stop for more details
